title: SUMMER CAMP PROGRAM - 211info
text: PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION SUMMER CAMP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides summer camps for youth with a focus on active, recreational, and educational activities. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 858 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Most activities are for children ages 3-11 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Half-day specialty camps are available at select locations. Email (503) 823-2525 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-2525 Customer Service Center (503) 858-9744 Other Modification requests Main phone (503) 823-2525 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Payment plans and discount program are available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PORTLAND PARKS PRESCHOOL FOOD - COMMUNITY GARDENS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ACCESS DISCOUNT PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CITY OF PORTLAND PARKS AND RECREATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
